notes: Anonymous dim block: two ext lines, one dim line, DIMDOT ticks, MTEXT 3280, DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: All drawable geometry sits on layer DIM with three LINEs forming a classic linear-dimension U (two vertical extension lines and one horizontal dimension line). Two INSERT of DIMDOT plus MTEXT '\A1;3280' and three DEFPOINTS POINTs match AutoCAD's exploded/anonymous dimension anatomy.
rationale.rule: Anonymous *D* blocks whose entities are only DIM/DEFPOINTS lines, dimension ticks, numeric MTEXT, and definition points are dimension caches, not plan geometry.
rationale.counterfactual: If the block contained WALL/A-WALL polylines or closed room outlines without dim ticks and numeric MTEXT, the role would shift toward 평면 부분도 or 기타.
rationale.uncertainty: Projection alone cannot show which parent objects are being measured or whether the dim is associative in the live drawing.

notes: Dim cache like *D295: DIM lines, DIMDOT, MTEXT 3105, DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Histogram and samples mirror a linear dimension: DIM-layer LINEs as extensions and span, DIMDOT INSERTs, MTEXT value 3105, and DEFPOINTS POINTs. No architectural wall layers or hatch/fill appear.
rationale.rule: When a *D* definition is composed solely of dimension-layer graphics plus DEFPOINTS, classify as 치수캐시 with near-zero wall likelihood.
rationale.counterfactual: Presence of thick parallel wall-core lines on a construction layer instead of DIMDOT/MTEXT would overturn the dimension-cache call.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot tell measured span semantics beyond the printed 3105 or linkage to nearby grid/axis from this fragment alone.

notes: Linear dimension anonymous block with MTEXT 4770 on DIM.

rationale.evidence: Two vertical LINEs and one horizontal LINE on DIM, paired DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT '\A1;4770', and three DEFPOINTS points reproduce a standard horizontal dimension block.
rationale.rule: Dimension terminator inserts (DIMDOT/_ArchTick) plus numeric MTEXT on DIM/axis-dim layers identify annotation caches rather than building fabric.
rationale.counterfactual: If MTEXT were a room name and LINEs formed a closed partition outline without ticks, judgment would move away from 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether 4770 is mm plan distance or another unit system is not stated in the projection metadata.

notes: DIM-layer linear dim cache; MTEXT 3945; no wall entities.

rationale.evidence: Entity mix is INSERT×2 (DIMDOT), LINE×3 on DIM, MTEXT 3945, POINT×3 on DEFPOINTS—the canonical anonymous dimension pattern. Bbox is a thin measurement strip, not a wall thickness pair.
rationale.rule: Treat *D### anonymous blocks with only dim graphics and DEFPOINTS as 치수캐시; do not nominate DIM extension lines as walls.
rationale.counterfactual: Replacing DIMDOT with furniture block inserts and adding seat/table outlines would flip role toward 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Parent dimension style and whether these lines are still linked to a DIMENSION entity outside the definition remain unknown.

notes: Wider overall dim (MTEXT 15100) still pure DIM/DEFPOINTS annotation.

rationale.evidence: Despite a much wider bbox spanning ~15100 in the text, contents remain DIM LINEs, DIMDOT ticks, MTEXT 15100, and DEFPOINTS—still a single overall linear dimension, not plan walls.
rationale.rule: Span length alone does not make dimension extension lines into walls; layer and terminator/text pattern decide the role.
rationale.counterfactual: If the long LINEs were on a WALL layer and lacked DIMDOT/MTEXT, wall_likelihood would rise sharply.
rationale.uncertainty: Slight residual doubt only because the long extensions could visually resemble elevation guides if layers were misnamed—but here layer=DIM contradicts that.

notes: Axis-dim layer AA-AXIS-DIM7; _ArchTick; MTEXT 70; DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Five LINEs and MTEXT on AA-AXIS-DIM7 with _ArchTick inserts and DEFPOINTS points form a short axis/offset dimension (text 70), including extension stubs typical of architectural tick dims.
rationale.rule: Axis-dimension layers (e.g. AA-AXIS-DIM*) with _ArchTick and numeric MTEXT still count as 치수캐시, not structural axes themselves.
rationale.counterfactual: If the block held only centerline SYMBOL geometry without dimension text/ticks, role could become 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot confirm which grid or wall face the 70 offset references from the local projection.

notes: AA-AXIS-DIM7 linear dim with _ArchTick and MTEXT 3000.

rationale.evidence: Two long extension LINEs, one dimension LINE, _ArchTick pair, MTEXT 3000, and DEFPOINTS on AA-AXIS-DIM7 match an axis-chain dimension segment.
rationale.rule: Numeric MTEXT plus architectural tick inserts on a *DIM* layer imply dimension cache regardless of AA-AXIS naming.
rationale.counterfactual: Absence of MTEXT/ticks and presence of continuous axis bubbles/circles would favor 심볼 over 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Projection does not reveal adjacent chain segments or whether 3000 aligns to a modular grid.

notes: Narrow AA-AXIS-DIM7 dim (MTEXT 210) with five LINEs and _ArchTick.

rationale.evidence: Compact strip of AA-AXIS-DIM7 LINEs including short wing stubs, _ArchTick INSERTs, MTEXT 210, and DEFPOINTS is a small-gap dimension, not a wall core.
rationale.rule: Short measured values with tick terminators on dim layers remain annotation; wall_line_handles stay empty.
rationale.counterfactual: If 210 described a wall thickness drawn as parallel WALL polylines without ticks, wall_likelihood would increase.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether 210 is a reveal, finish offset, or opening jamb cannot be read from entities alone.

notes: DIM-layer short dim with _ArchTick and MTEXT 70.

rationale.evidence: Same anatomy as *D300 but on DIM: five LINEs, _ArchTick×2, MTEXT 70, DEFPOINTS×3—clear linear dimension graphics.
rationale.rule: Identical geometry patterns on DIM versus AA-AXIS-DIM7 both map to 치수캐시 when ticks and numeric text are present.
rationale.counterfactual: Swapping content for door/window elevation symbol blocks would change role to 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: No host wall or opening entity is included, so measured feature type is unknown.

notes: DIM linear dim segment; _ArchTick; MTEXT 2900.

rationale.evidence: Three DIM LINEs as extensions/span, _ArchTick terminators, MTEXT 2900, and DEFPOINTS points constitute a mid-chain axis/plan dimension block.
rationale.rule: Anonymous *D* definitions dominated by dim-layer lines + tick inserts + numeric MTEXT are 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: Adding furniture footprints or equipment tags inside the bbox would push classification toward 가구 or 기타.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot see whether this segment continues a longer string of *D* dims along the same baseline.

notes: Narrow DIM dim with MTEXT 135 and _ArchTick.

rationale.evidence: Two close vertical extension LINEs, one horizontal dim LINE, MTEXT 135, _ArchTick inserts, and DEFPOINTS match a small offset/gap dimension on DIM.
rationale.rule: Small numeric values do not imply walls; terminator type and DIM/DEFPOINTS membership dominate the role decision.
rationale.counterfactual: If LINEs were doubled as wall faces on a wall layer without _ArchTick/MTEXT, they could be wall candidates.
rationale.uncertainty: Semantic of 135 (clearance vs thickness vs reveal) is not recoverable from this projection.

notes: Sibling narrow dim to *D305; MTEXT 135 on DIM.

rationale.evidence: Entity histogram and samples duplicate the short linear-dimension recipe: DIM LINEs, _ArchTick×2, MTEXT 135, DEFPOINTS×3.
rationale.rule: Repeated identical *D* neighbors with the same dim anatomy reinforce 치수캐시 rather than unique plan parts.
rationale.counterfactual: A unique closed polyline plan detail without dimension text would instead suggest 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Relationship between this 135 and the adjacent *D305 135 (e.g., wall both sides of a grid) is outside the fragment.

notes: Longer DIM span dim; _ArchTick; MTEXT 4500.

rationale.evidence: Wide horizontal dim LINE between two extensions, _ArchTick pair, MTEXT 4500, and DEFPOINTS on DIM are textbook linear dimension contents.
rationale.rule: Long measured spans remain annotation when packaged with ticks and DIM/DEFPOINTS only.
rationale.counterfactual: If the span LINEs enclosed a hatch or door swing without dim text, role would not be 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether 4500 is a bay width or room width cannot be fixed without surrounding plan context.

notes: Short DIM dim MTEXT 135 with _ArchTick terminators.

rationale.evidence: Samples show only DIM-layer dimension graphics and DEFPOINTS; MTEXT 135 and _ArchTick confirm annotation purpose; no wall-like closed pairs.
rationale.rule: Do not list dimension extension or dimension lines in wall_line_handles when role is 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: Renaming layers to WALL and removing ticks/text would force reconsideration as possible wall geometry.
rationale.uncertainty: Exact drafting standard (ISO vs architectural ticks) is hinted by _ArchTick but host objects remain unseen.

notes: Another short DIM gap dim; MTEXT 135; _ArchTick.

rationale.evidence: Identical structure to neighboring short dims: three DIM LINEs, _ArchTick×2, MTEXT 135, DEFPOINTS×3.
rationale.rule: Series of *D* blocks with the same dim recipe along a baseline are each independently 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: A single block aggregating many non-dim symbols (north arrow, section marks) would be 심볼 or 기타.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot determine if successive 135 values mark wall thickness at columns without the model space inserts.

notes: DIM linear dim with MTEXT 3600 and _ArchTick.

rationale.evidence: Two extension LINEs, one span LINE, _ArchTick inserts, MTEXT 3600, and DEFPOINTS points on DIM form a clear horizontal dimension cache.
rationale.rule: Anonymous dimension definitions named *D### with dim ticks and numeric MTEXT map to role 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: If the definition also stored wall polylines used only as witnesses, wall_likelihood might rise—but none are present here.
rationale.uncertainty: Association to a specific room or structural bay is not in the projection.

notes: End-of-chain DIM dim; five LINEs; _ArchTick; MTEXT 210.

rationale.evidence: Five DIM LINEs including end stubs, _ArchTick×2, MTEXT 210, and DEFPOINTS match a terminal short dimension in an axis string, analogous to *D302.
rationale.rule: Extra wing LINEs on dim layers are still dimension construction, not walls, when paired with ticks and numeric text.
rationale.counterfactual: Replacing _ArchTick/MTEXT with a door leaf and swing arc would move the label toward 심볼 or 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: End-condition meaning (exterior face vs finish stack) cannot be inferred from handles alone.

notes: Vertical-ish linear dim (DIMDOT); MTEXT 2665 on DIM.

rationale.evidence: Two horizontal extension LINEs and one vertical dim LINE on DIM, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 2665, and DEFPOINTS indicate a vertical measurement dimension rather than plan walls.
rationale.rule: Orientation of the dimension (horizontal vs vertical text span) does not change classification when the entity recipe is still dim ticks + numeric MTEXT + DEFPOINTS.
rationale.counterfactual: If LINEs formed a stair or railing detail without dimension text, role would leave 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether this measures a height in elevation or a vertical distance in plan is ambiguous from 2D handles only.

notes: Stacked vertical dim segment; DIMDOT; MTEXT 2350.

rationale.evidence: Same vertical-dimension pattern as *D312 continuing upward: DIM LINEs, DIMDOT×2, MTEXT 2350, DEFPOINTS×3—annotation chain, not walls.
rationale.rule: Stacked *D* siblings sharing DIMDOT + DEFPOINTS + numeric MTEXT remain independent 치수캐시 units.
rationale.counterfactual: A block containing only a section-cut symbol triangle without measurement text would be 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Continuity with *D312/*D314 as one elevation string is plausible but not proven inside this definition.

notes: Short vertical dim; DIMDOT; MTEXT 780 on DIM.

rationale.evidence: Compact vertical linear dimension: two horizontal extensions, one vertical dim LINE, DIMDOT ticks, MTEXT 780, DEFPOINTS—pure dim cache anatomy.
rationale.rule: Short final segments in a dim stack still classify as 치수캐시; empty wall_line_handles when no non-dim geometry exists.
rationale.counterfactual: If MTEXT were absent and LINEs outlined a fixture or cabinet, role could become 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Measured feature (sill, parapet step, etc.) cannot be named from the anonymous block alone.
